session.user: Run `make docs-check` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results. This validates documentation files.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make docs-check` command to validate documentation files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run documentation validation check via make

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
**make docs-check passed:** All documentation validation checks completed successfully.
